title: Gear Fifth Awakens
description: On pages 4–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Straw Hat Pirates, Nami as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We're gonna save you no matter what!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This tower has become quite crowded all of a sudden...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Staying here much longer would be a death sentence.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you're gonna run, leave your key, okay?

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 11 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
